brands.romanson: A South Korean brand that embodies modern aesthetics and refined minimalism. Each model reflects a pursuit of harmony between form and function, combining clean design with high-quality craftsmanship.
brands.adriatica:
A Swiss watch brand with a rich history, embodying the traditions of precise movements
and elegant, classic design. Each model combines signature Swiss Made quality
with a versatile style suitable for both everyday wear and special occasions.
brands.appella: A Swiss watch brand that combines centuries-old traditions of precise timekeeping with elegant, understated design. The high precision of its movements, the Swiss Made mark, and its simplicity make these timepieces versatile for both casual and business wear.
brands.pierre-ricaud: A German watch brand that harmoniously blends classic elegance with contemporary design solutions. Each model is meticulously crafted: precise proportions, high-quality materials, and reliable mechanisms create a well-balanced accessory.
brands.rhythm:
A Japanese brand with a rich history in watch and movement production, renowned for its combination of technical precision and sophisticated design.
Its products offer stylish and practical solutions. Rhythm places particular emphasis on the quality of its materials and precision.

brandPage.notFoundDescription: Check the page address or choose a brand from the navigation.
brandPage.productsError: Failed to load products for this brand.
brandPage.productsEmpty: No products for this brand were found yet.

intro.left:
Vympel is a watch distributor
with more than 30 years of market experience.
intro.right: Over these years, we have built partnerships with leading global brands and created a reliable supply system so we can offer customers only original products and impeccable service. Our mission is to make quality watches accessible to people who value aesthetics, precision, and a true culture of time.

official.title: Official status and warranty
official.text: We operate officially and are authorized distributors in Kazakhstan. We guarantee the authenticity and quality of every watch presented in our store, and we provide service and warranty support.

expertise.title: Experience and expertise
expertise.text: For more than 30 years, our company has distributed original watches, visited international exhibitions, spoken with experts, and followed the trends of watchmaking art.

selection.title: Careful product selection
selection.text: Every model that enters our catalog passes a strict selection process. We evaluate design, material quality, and movement precision to make sure we offer only truly worthy watches.

service.title: Personalized service
service.text: Our managers will help you at every stage, from selection to purchase. We are ready to answer questions, give recommendations, and help find watches that reflect your personal style.

cooperation.title: Cooperation and partnership
cooperation.body1: We are always glad to start new collaborations and are open to interesting projects.
cooperation.body2: Over more than 30 years of work, we have accumulated deep experience in watch distribution, understand the market, and know how to create value for our partners. Joint campaigns, exclusive collections, or special projects - we are ready to discuss any ideas and bring them to life together.
cooperation.body3: Contact us, and let us create unique solutions that combine style, quality, and trust.

philosophy.title:
TIME
IS ART
philosophy.start: In the era of digitalization, when every moment can be measured and recorded to the millisecond, the concept of time has become utilitarian. We have grown used to looking at a screen to know the time — quickly, thoughtlessly, between notifications and messages. But the true value of time is not in numbers, but in the ощущение of its flow. Mechanical watches bring us back to this awareness. Their ticking is a reminder of life’s rhythm, that every moment is created not for haste, but for meaning. It is the choice of those who see in time not a tool, but an art.
philosophy.end: Our approach is rooted in respect for tradition and a стремление to modernity. We believe that a watch is not just a device for measuring time, but a reflection of personality, taste, and state of mind. In a world of technology, where everything becomes virtual, mechanical watches remain the last physical embodiment of time — an object you can feel, hear, pass on. They live by their own laws and remind us: the present is not on a screen, but in the movement of gears reflecting our rhythm.

intro.paragraph1: We guarantee the quality and reliability of the products we sell and take full responsibility for their proper operation during the established warranty period.
intro.paragraph2: Before shipping, every product undergoes a mandatory inspection for manufacturing defects, faults, and package discrepancies. We ship only properly working and fully completed products.
intro.paragraph3: If a product stops working during the warranty period, our company covers all expenses related to warranty service, including:

serviceItems.deliveryToService: arranging and paying for product delivery to the service center;
serviceItems.returnDelivery: return delivery of the repaired product to the recipient.

lower.paragraph1: Warranty service is provided when the product operating conditions are followed and does not cover damage caused by mechanical impact, improper use, or independent intervention in the product structure.
lower.paragraph2: Our goal is to make warranty service as simple and transparent as possible for the customer, without extra costs or complications.

delivery.title: Delivery

intro.paragraph1: Orders are delivered by the delivery services of the marketplaces where our products are available:
intro.paragraph2: All logistics operations, including order processing, delivery times, and delivery cost, are handled by the selected marketplace according to its rules.
intro.paragraph3: Current information about delivery times and methods is shown when placing the order on the marketplace platform.
intro.paragraph4: You can also pick up your order independently at our store.

delivery.final: Before handoff, an order may be additionally checked for completeness and appearance.

payment.title: Payment

intro.paragraph1: When placing an order on marketplaces, payment is made directly on the marketplace platform according to its rules and available payment methods:
intro.paragraph2: Available payment methods, fund posting times, and payment confirmation are determined by the selected marketplace and shown during checkout.
intro.paragraph3: You can also pay for your order in our store.

payment.methodsIntro: For pickup from our store, payment is available in the following ways:

methods.cards: bank cards through Kaspi Bank and Halyk Bank terminals;

payment.final: Payment is made when the product is received.

tabs.warrantyText: The watch is covered by the manufacturer's warranty. Keep your receipt and packaging for service.
tabs.deliveryText: Delivery is coordinated with a manager after the order is placed. Available methods depend on the city.
tabs.paymentText: You can pay after availability and purchase details are confirmed with a Vympel manager.

warrantyInfo.title: Product warranty period - 1 year
warrantyInfo.description: If the product fails during the warranty period, our company covers all expenses related to warranty service, including delivery of the product to the service center, repair work, and return delivery of the repaired product to the recipient.

deliveryInfo.paragraph1: Orders are delivered by marketplace services where our products are available: Kaspi, Wildberries, Ozon.
deliveryInfo.paragraph2: Delivery times and costs are set by the marketplace and shown during checkout.
deliveryInfo.paragraph3:
Free pickup from the store is also available.
The address and working hours are shown on the site.

paymentInfo.paragraph1: Orders are paid through marketplaces when purchasing on their platforms: Kaspi, Wildberries, Ozon.
paymentInfo.paragraph2: For pickup from the store, payment is available by:

methods.cards: bank cards through Kaspi Bank and Halyk Bank terminals;

contact.heading: Contact us
contact.body1: Choosing a watch can raise more questions than it seems at first glance.
contact.body2: We value an informed approach to choosing a product and are always ready to help. If you'd like advice, clarify details, or find the perfect model, please submit a request, and our managers will contact you via WhatsApp. We'll answer all your questions, share recommendations, and help you make a confident decision.
contact.body3: Your time is in reliable hands.
